<includeonly><table class="infobox">
<caption>{{{number|{{PAGENAME}}}}}</caption>
{{#if:{{{title|}}}|<tr><td colspan="2" class="infobox-above">{{{title}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{discipline|}}}|<tr><th>Discipline</th><td>{{{discipline}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{area|}}}|<tr><th>Area</th><td>{{{area}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{scale|}}}|<tr><th>Scale</th><td>{{{scale}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{rev|}}}|<tr><th>Revision</th><td>{{{rev}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{rev_date|}}}|<tr><th>Rev date</th><td>{{{rev_date}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{sheet_size|}}}|<tr><th>Sheet size</th><td>{{{sheet_size}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{match_lines|}}}|<tr><th>Match lines</th><td>{{{match_lines}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{supersedes|}}}|<tr><th>Supersedes</th><td>{{{supersedes}}}</td></tr>}}
</table></includeonly><noinclude>
== Usage ==
<pre>
{{Infobox drawing
| number      = C-301
| title       = Primary Clarifier Site Plan
| discipline  = Civil
| area        = [[Area 03 — Primary Clarifiers]]
| scale       = 1" = 20'
| rev         = 3
| rev_date    = 2025-11-15
| sheet_size  = D (24x36)
| match_lines = [[Drawing:C-300]], [[Drawing:C-302]]
}}
</pre>

[[Category:Templates]]
</noinclude>
